business_terms.definition: Current available inventory quantity in warehouse.
Inventory quantity reserved for existing customer orders.
Minimum stock threshold that triggers replenishment.when inventory falls below this level.
Current status of shipment such as In Transit or Delivered.
Formal request issued to supplier for purchasing materials.
Customer order representing product sales transaction.
Category of customer such as Retail or Wholesale.
Transportation cost associated with shipment movement.
Status indicating whether purchase delivery is completed.
Reward points accumulated by customers through purchases.
